title: turnera lineata
intro: Turnera lineata, also known as Sweet Root or Calendula de la Tierra, is a perennial plant species native to the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Turnera lineata include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and soothing menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Turnera lineata can be found in various forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
